mapper.select: SELECT BATCH_APP_NAME AS batchAppName, CRON_TEXT AS cronText, SLA_SECONDS AS slaSeconds FROM FWK_BATCH_APP WHERE BATCH_APP_ID = #{batchAppId}

SELECT a.BATCH_APP_ID AS batchAppId, a.BATCH_APP_FILE_NAME AS batchAppFileName, a.CRON_TEXT AS cronText FROM FWK_BATCH_APP a JOIN FWK_WAS_EXEC_BATCH w ON a.BATCH_APP_ID = w.BATCH_APP_ID WHERE w.INSTANCE_ID = #{instanceId} AND w.USE_YN = 'Y' AND a.CRON_TEXT IS NOT NULL
